headings: Included in this Contract Package are the following:
text: - Exhibit G -Marsh OCIP Insurance Requirements & Manual -Email Certificate of Insurance including required endorsements to Greystar.ROCIP@marsh.com -and -mary.parker@greystar.com Complete the OCIP Enrollment via the Marsh Insurance Portal for assistance contact Mikayla Gluskin Greystar.ROCIP@marsh.com . NOTE*** WORK CANNOT BEGIN ON SITE UNTIL YOUR INSURANCE IS APPROVED AND YOU ARE OCIP ENROLLED***
